Don't Cling to Cash. Check Out These Other Low-Risk Income Investments.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR ICE Preferred Securities ETF (PSK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of non-convertible preferred stocks and securities that are functionally equivalent to preferred stocks. PSK was launched on Sep 16, 2009 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: ICE Exchange-Listed Fixed& Adjustable Rate Preferred Securities Index
